intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs have no idea what's coming. Enjoy these easy minutes while they last.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Start easy and build gradually. You're preparing your body for something special.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Progressive warm-up elevating core temperature and activating neuromuscular systems.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Take your time here. Smooth breathing, easy cadence. Get ready.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sprint like your FTP test results are chasing you.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Explosive power! Give everything for these short bursts.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Anaerobic glycolytic system engagement. Maximum motor unit recruitment.
coachingNotes.MIXED: All out. No holding back. Recovery is coming.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Comfortably hard. Emphasis on 'hard' as the minutes tick by.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Tempo builds the bridge between endurance and threshold.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 3: glycogen storage optimization, improved fat/sugar fuel crossover.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Steady effort. You should be breathing harder but in control.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2. Also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the aerobic engine. This is the foundation of everything.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy. Conversational pace. Build your base.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: You survived. Your muscles are screaming, but you did it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Nice work! Spin easy and let your body recover.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Easy aerobic recovery spin to facilitate lactate clearance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Bring it down smoothly. You earned this recovery.
